allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''docs/postman_collection.json''\)\); print\([i[''name''] for i in d[''item'']]\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''docs/postman_collection.json'',encoding=''utf-8''\)\); print\([i[''name''] for i in d[''item'']]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''docs/postman_collection.json'',encoding=''utf-8''\)\); print\(len\(d[''item'']\)\); ai_folder=[i for i in d[''item''] if ''AI'' in i[''name'']]; print\(''AI folder:'', ai_folder[0][''name''] if ai_folder else ''NOT FOUND''\); print\(''AI requests:'', len\(ai_folder[0][''item'']\) if ai_folder else 0\)")
